details.test: Task 1: Apply to highest-paying remote Senior Backend Developer job in US
Task 2: Submit talent request for 3 mid-level Node.js developers
Task 3: Choose cheaper engagement model under 15000 and submit inquiry
Task 4: Create job alert for remote React Developer roles
Task 5: Shortlist highest-rated Python developer in Europe
Task 6: Request similar project for fintech mobile case study (2023-2024)
Task 7: Calculate 3-month web app estimate and send it
Task 8: Book MVP development consultation next week between 10:00-12:00
Task 9: Save job starting next month into "London part-time roles" collection (adapted)
